parameters.query:
WITH upd AS (
  UPDATE table_2
  column_1 $3,
    minio_key     = $4,
    mime_type     = $5,
    upload_source = 'owner_chat',
    price         = CASE WHEN $6::numeric IS NOT NULL THEN $6::numeric ELSE price END,
    price_label   = CASE WHEN $7 IS NOT NULL AND $7 <> '' THEN $7 ELSE price_label END,
    updated_at    = now()
  column_2 $1::uuid
    column_3 $2
    AND ($8::uuid IS NULL column_4 $8::uuid)
  RETURNING product_name, minio_url, price, price_label, 'replaced' AS action
)
INSERT INTO table_2
  (tenant_id, business_id, product_name, display_name, minio_url, minio_key,
   mime_type, upload_source, image_type, show_on_store, price, price_label)
SELECT $1::uuid, $8::uuid, $2, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'owner_chat', 'product', true,
       $6::numeric, NULLIF($7, '')
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM table_3)
RETURNING product_name, minio_url, price, price_label, 'saved' AS action;
